critic_justifications.NY Times: Positive review praising the show's emotional depth and the chemistry between Criss and Shen in this tender robot love story.
critic_justifications.Variety: Favorable reception noting the show's unique premise and strong performances, though with some reservations about pacing.
critic_justifications.Hollywood Reporter: Generally positive review highlighting the musical's charm and innovative staging in its Seoul setting.
critic_justifications.NY Post: Mixed-to-positive review appreciating the heart of the story while noting it doesn't fully transcend its high-concept premise.
critic_justifications.The Guardian: Strong review praising the show's emotional resonance and the performances of the lead actors.
critic_justifications.Time Out NY: Positive reception emphasizing the show's originality and the tender relationship at its core.
critic_justifications.TheaterMania: Favorable review noting solid performances and an engaging story, with minor critiques on execution.
critic_justifications.Vulture: Mixed review appreciating the ambition and performances but finding some narrative elements uneven.
critic_justifications.Associated Press: Positive review highlighting the show's unique concept and the chemistry between the leads.
critic_justifications.BroadwayWorld: Generally positive reception praising the emotional storytelling and innovative musical staging.

audience_justifications.Show-Score: Audience consensus has been strongly positive with ratings in the A-/A range, reflecting appreciation for the emotional story and performances.
audience_justifications.Broadway Scorecard: Audience polling shows solid positive reception with strong marks for the unique premise and lead performances.
audience_justifications.Broadway.com: Community ratings reflect favorable audience response to the show's heart and originality.
